MacGregor · Deck Equipment

MacGregor / TTS Deck Machinery

Confirmed OEM spare parts for MacGregor and TTS Marine deck machinery – cargo crane hydraulic pumps, valve blocks, mooring winch components.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
289 0840-801Balance Valve, Hose Handling Crane – Cargo Crane
289 1833-801Hydraulic Hoisting Pump (item A) – Cargo Crane
289 1834-801Hydraulic Hoisting Pump (item B / paired unit) – Cargo Crane
1237625Control Valve Block (crane) – Cargo Crane
HPV105T-02R / 391 0808-801Variable Piston Pump, deck crane
1268326Motor Seal Kit – Hatch Cover / Crane
1355064WD-7020Control Valve Group (hatch cover) DWG 1355064WD-7020
32-18594Control Valve Group DWG 32-18594 – Hatch Cover
8001914Grease Valve with Ball Valve DWG 8001914 – Hatch Cover
TN-1000183-MB / 03-123883/0BPlanetary Gearbox Assembly (Kocks deck machinery) – Anchor/Mooring Winch
DWG 03-128.886/0Control Block NG32 (hydraulic, mooring winch)
SNM-LBV17Counter Balance Valve (windlass / winch) – Windlass / Mooring Winch
No. 114029Axial Piston Motor, hose handling crane – Item 05005874 – Crane Hoist
A54205Hydraulic Directional Valve (hatch cover)
CV-RV-LBV25 / 3006285Counter Balance Valve Block Unit LBV25 – Hatch Cover
(cut to size)Brake Lining material – bond with Bostik Kontaktlim 3006 adhesive – Windlass / Mooring Winch

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
